title: Calendly: Google Authentication Issues

summary: CloudFlare has resolved the issue on their end and uninterrupted access to Calendly should be restored. Our team will continue to monitor for any changes.

title: Calendly: iCloud calendar connection issue
summary: iCloud calendar connection support has been restored.

title: Calendly: Stripe unavailable
summary:
Stripe billing and account upgrade/downgrade functionality have been fully restored.

On 2019-07-10, the Stripe API was unavailable from 16:36–17:02 UTC, and again from 21:14–22:47 UTC. Stripe has confirmed that systems are restored and fully operational.

title: Calendly: Stripe billing unavailable
summary:
Stripe has resolved the issue and their billing functionality has been restored within the Calendly system.
https://status.stripe.com/

title: Calendly: Calendly down
summary: Cloudflare systems have recovered and access to Calendly and Zendesk has been restored. Our developers will continue to monitor going forward.

title: Calendly: Unable to connect to Google Calendar service
summary:
Google reports that its services have been fully restored and the issues are now resolved.

More information on the status of the Google Calendar service can be found at https://www.google.com/appsstatus#hl=en&v=issue&sid=2&iid=cc21ebe3962430b2e4ae2b52e3dde98f

title: Calendly: Scheduled Maintenance: Status Page Migration to Incident.io
summary:
Whats changing?
On April 15, 2026 - April 17, 2026 we will start migrating our status page to incident.io. This migration is part of our ongoing efforts to enhance monitoring, observability, and platform reliability.

With incident.io, we’re integrating our incident response, on-call management, and post-incident reviews into a single platform, ensuring a smoother incident response process and the best support for our customers during incidents.

title: PaperCut: PaperCut Hive - Some users are intermittently unable to release print jobs or experience intermittent loading in the Hive admin portal — Resolved
summary:
This incident has now been fully resolved. We have confirmed that print jobs are releasing successfully. 

Our apologies for any downtime that you experienced as a result of this outage. We will be performing a full retro and incident analysis, as we do with all issues that impact our customers.

If you experience other issues please report this via https://www.papercut.com/support/.

title: Google Workspace: Operational
summary: Status changed from Degraded Performance to Operational

title:
Google Workspace: **Summary**
Google Workspace users using Google IdP are unable to sign into their accounts using security keys and hardware based passkeys.
**Description**
We are experiencing an issue with Workspace users beginning on Thursday, 2026-04-09 19:08 PDT.
Our engineering team continues to investigate the issue.
We will provide an update by Friday, 2026-04-10 04:00 PDT with current details.
We apologize to all who are affected by the disruption.
**Customer Symptoms**
Google Workspace users using Google IdP are unable to sign into their accounts using security keys and hardware based passkeys.
**Workaround**
Below steps should be performed by Admin as the workaround:
- Admin should revoke the key.
- Admin to create the verification code to sign-in.
- The user should sign-in using Backup verification code and then re-enrolls the security key. — Resolved
summary: This incident has been resolved.

title: Canva: Some users may experience issues accessing AI Voice
summary: Users may be unable to access the AI Voice feature for video creation. We are aware of the issue and are investigating a fix.

title: Ad Astra: Astra Schedule 8: Website unavailable for some clients
summary: From 8:50 CDT to 10:59 CDT AS8 was intermittently unavailable for a subset of clients. A sub-process was in a bad state and filled up the system drive, leading to unsuitability. We detected the failure but were delayed in resolving the issue while we investigated. We've implemented several mitigation to both detect and prevent this issue.

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Current status and actions being taken: We've deployed an emergency fix to address the issues contributing to intermittent errors with Slackbot and Workflows. We're now seeing significant recovery across all affected services and are continuing to monitor the situation closely to ensure performance remains stable. 

We'll provide another update in 60 minutes.

title: SmartDeploy: Delay in Group Recounts — investigating
summary: We are continuing to investigate the issue.

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Current status and actions being taken: We’ve deployed a configuration fix, resulting in significant improvements to Slackbot success rates and health metrics. We're now monitoring the situation as we investigate a secondary cache issue that may be contributing to intermittent errors or degraded workflow performance.

We'll provide another update in 60 minutes.

title: SmartDeploy: Delay in Group Recounts
summary: We are currently investigating an issue with a delay in group count calculations. With group count delays automations triggered off groups will be delayed.

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Current status and actions being taken: Upon further review, we've identified issues with secondary caching and are currently working on a configuration fix. In parallel, we're continuing to investigate and assess several solutions to restore ‌services.

We'll provide another update in 60 minutes.

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Current status and actions being taken: The code fix hasn't successfully addressed the impact and we're resuming our investigations. 

We'll provide another update in 60 minutes.

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Current status and actions being taken: We've begun deploying the code fix to production. Once complete we'll begin monitoring the performance of Slackbot, as well as our other AI-powered features.

We'll provide another update in 60 minutes.

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Current status and actions being taken: We believe we've identified an issue that's still causing impact to occur even after our upstream provider has resolved impact from their end. We expect a code fix to take at least an hour to complete and pass through various test environments. 

We'll provide another update in 60 minutes.

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Current status and actions being taken: We're continuing to engage with our third-party provider to find a solution. No further alleviative actions have been undertaken since our last update.

We'll provide another update in 60 minutes until the impact is resolved for all users.

title: Slack: Trouble with Slackbot and AI-powered features — investigating
summary:
Current status and actions being taken: We've taken steps to try to reduce the impact on Slackbot and its response capabilities. Customers may notice signs of improvement, however, the impact may still be intermittent until full resolution. 

Other AI-powered features, including Search Answers, Meeting Notes, and Translation, are still experiencing issues due to the ongoing upstream problem. We're investigating similar alleviative actions for these features.

We'll provide another update in 60 m

title:
Google Workspace: **Summary**
AppSheet customers are experiencing redirection to asia-southeast.appsheet.com instead of their intended application URLs.
**Description**
Beginning on Wednesday, 2026-04-08 14:05 PDT, we are experiencing an issue with AppSheet that caused users to be erroneously redirected to the asia-southeast region.
Our engineers have identified the cause was due to a recent change and have reverted. Our internal telemetry shows the signs of recovery and are currently monitoring the recovery status. We expect full service recovery within an hour.
We will provide an update by Wednesday, 2026-04-08 16:30 PDT with current details
**Customer Symptoms**
Users are automatically redirected to asia-southeast.appsheet.com, which may cause "Forbidden" or 403 errors when attempting to access their apps.
**Workaround**
None at this time. — Resolved
summary: This incident has been resolved.

title: Jamf: Jamf School: Degraded Performance (USE & EU) — monitoring
summary: A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results.

title: PaperCut: PaperCut Hive & PaperCut MF - Some users experiencing failures Scanning to Google Drive — Resolved
summary:
This incident has now been fully resolved. We have confirmed that Scan to Google drive is operational via internal testing and reports from multiple customers.

If you experience other issues please report this via https://www.papercut.com/support/.

title: SmartDeploy: Planned Maintenance - Connect
summary:
We will be performing scheduled maintenance for Connect on April 15, 2026 at 10:00 pm EDT. 

During this time, there will be a brief interruption of service. 

We expect maintenance to be completed by or before April 16, 12:00 am EDT.

title: Jamf: Jamf School: Degraded Performance (USE & EU) — identified
summary: We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue.

title: Jamf: Jamf School: Degraded Performance (USE & EU) — identified
summary: We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue.

title: PaperCut: PaperCut Hive & PaperCut MF - Some users experiencing failures Scanning to Google Drive — monitoring
summary:
We have pushed a fix to production which means functionality should now be fully restored. No action is needed to resume scanning to Google Drive.

We are continuing to monitor this incident. If you're still experiencing issues please report this via https://www.papercut.com/support/.

title: Jamf: Jamf School: Degraded Performance (USE)
summary: The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.

title: Kuali Build: Platform/Build loading issues
summary: This issue was caused by a temporary disruption during recent updates that impacted connectivity between services. Service was restored shortly after the issue was identified. We are taking steps to improve deployment processes and reduce the risk of similar disruptions in the future.

title: PaperCut: PaperCut Hive & PaperCut MF - Some users experiencing failures Scanning to Google Drive — investigating
summary: We are continuing to investigate this issue.

title: PaperCut: PaperCut Hive - Some users experiencing failures Scanning to Google Drive
summary:
PaperCut Hive - Some users experiencing failures Scanning to Google Drive

Our development team are currently investigating an intermittent issue affecting PaperCut Hive's scanning functionality for the UK hosting region only. 

The impacted features are:

Integrated Scanning: Users may see errors such as “"Something went wrong sending your scan" via an email notification that the scan was not delivered. This incident affects only scan to Google Drive.

We’re actively working to resolve the issu

summary: Status changed from Operational to Degraded Performance

title: Slack: Operational
summary: Status changed from Major Outage to Operational

title: Slack: Slackbot button in the top navigation is disappearing — investigating
summary:
Our work on this issue is still ongoing.
Current status and actions being taken:  We've identified the cause of the issue affecting the Slackbot button in the top navigation bar and have taken steps to address it. The issue is no longer present for affected users. Users who are currently experiencing the issue may need to reload Slack for the fix to take effect. We're continuing to monitor and will provide an update once service has been fully restored.
We'll provide another update in 30 minutes

title: Slack: Major Outage
summary: Status changed from Operational to Major Outage

title: Slack: Slackbot button in the top navigation is disappearing
summary: We’re aware of an issue introduced in build 121247 that affects the Slackbot button in the top navigation bar. As a result, the button may no longer be visible to users. We've identified a fix and are performing a rollback to restore the button for all affected users. We will provide an update in 30 minutes, or sooner if additional information becomes available. Thank you for your patience while we continue to investigate the situation.

title: ClickUp: Multiple Features Unavailable — monitoring
summary: We have worked with our third-party vendor to mitigate the issue leading to missing Workspace features in our web, desktop, and mobile applications. Functionality should be restored at this point. We will continue monitoring to ensure the issue is fully resolved.

title: ClickUp: Multiple Features Unavailable — identified
summary:
After receiving new reports, we are investigating additional cases of certain Workspace features across our web, desktop, and mobile applications not appearing as expected.

This issue has been identified as originating from a third-party vendor, and we are actively working with their team toward a resolution. We’ll continue to provide updates until we return to a monitoring status.

title: Zoom: Service Degradation Affecting Sign In and Joining Meetings
summary:
A subset of users might have experienced error code 1132 with sign in and joining meetings.

On 03/31/206 Between 03:15 UTC to 17:02 UTC, A subset of us may have experienced error code 1132 with sign in and joining meetings.

This incident has been resolved and the affected services have been restored.

Our team will continue to monitor the situation closely and keep you informed of any further developments.

title: Slack: Operational
summary: Status changed from Major Outage to Operational

title: Slack: Issue with Sending and Receiving Messages — investigating
summary: A fix has been deployed to the affected shards. ProcessMessage jobs had been paused, and these have now been unpaused on the affected shards. We are monitoring performance to assess whether the shards have returned to expected performance levels.

title: Slack: Issue with Sending and Receiving Messages — investigating
summary: We’re continuing to investigate the issue. We have identified two affected shards that are becoming overloaded, causing elevated query failures and message-related degradations. We are in the process of testing a potential fix. We’ll provide the next update once new information becomes available.

title: Slack: Major Outage
summary: Status changed from Operational to Major Outage

title: Slack: Issue with Sending and Receiving Messages
summary:
We're investigating a new incident.
Current impact to end users: Some users may experience elevated error rates and message-related degradations when sending and receiving messages across the Slack platform
Teams are actively engaged to identify the root cause and remediate the service impact and will provide updates as information is available.  
We apologize for the inconvenience and will continue sharing updates as they become available.
